progress_update.completed_slice: Implemented and deterministically tested a fail-closed evidence acceptance builder for Cloudflare deployment proof inputs.
remaining: Generate a real cloudflare-evidence-verification-input.json from cryptographic verification, digest comparison, trusted-builder policy, and deployment-proof validation outputs.
Invoke build-evidence-acceptance.mjs in the deployment workflow and upload cloudflare-deployment-acceptance.json as a separate artifact.
Fail the final workflow gate when decision is not accept, after evidence artifacts are uploaded.
Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and dispatch the workflow to obtain a resolving deployment URL.
